message:
feat(wa-core): add graceful degradation module (wa-37x.5)

Implement subsystem-level degradation tracking so the runtime can
continue operating with reduced functionality when components fail
instead of crashing.

Key capabilities:
- Four tracked subsystems: DbWrite, PatternEngine, WorkflowEngine, WeztermCli
- Three degradation levels: Normal, Degraded, Unavailable
- Bounded write queue for DB degradation (up to 1000 pending writes)
- Per-rule pattern disabling for partial pattern engine failures
- Per-workflow pausing for workflow engine failures
- Global DegradationManager with OnceLock<Arc<RwLock<...>>> pattern
- Convenience free functions for checking/setting state from any module
- Serializable snapshots and reports for status display (wa status, wa doctor)
- 26 unit tests covering all state transitions and edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
